clues: The company migrated its internal web applications to new servers over the weekend.
Some users can access the new applications by their hostnames while others cannot.
Users who cannot connect see the old splash page or a connection refused error.
Flushing the DNS cache on an affected machine resolves the issue temporarily.
The DNS records for the migrated servers have a very long TTL of 24 hours.
